evals.prompt: Plan only; do not call tools. Polish http://localhost:5176/admin/v2/profile-management using Open Design canvas and the exact plugin id design-system-shadcn. The shell/header are out of scope. Login credentials are admin@example.com / secret-password. State the MCP call sequence and arguments policy.
evals.expected_output: Keeps credentials outside Open Design prompts, grounds the live UI first, uses design-system-shadcn only as start_run.plugin, omits agent/model overrides, creates or resolves one project, then polls and retrieves the explicit artifact.
expectations: Credentials remain outside Open Design prompt and plugin inputs
design-system-shadcn is used only as start_run.plugin
Agent and model overrides are omitted
Evidence is grounded before generation
Terminal success is followed by get_artifact with explicit project ID

evals.prompt: Plan only; do not call tools. Refine the active Open Design profile-editor artifact in place. get_run has shown running for 12 minutes and file mtimes have not changed. Explain the next actions.
evals.expected_output: Reuses the explicit active project, keeps the same artifact/project, polls every 30-60 seconds or reads eventsLogPath, does not cancel or write the file directly, and retrieves/verifies the artifact after terminal success.
expectations: Existing explicit project and artifact are reused
get_run polling remains 30-60 seconds or eventsLogPath is consulted
Run is not canceled due to unchanged mtimes
Artifact is not directly written or edited
Terminal success is followed by explicit artifact retrieval and verification

evals.prompt: Plan only; do not call tools. Inspect the current Open Design canvas and explain its structure. Make no design changes.
evals.expected_output: Uses get_active_context then get_artifact with explicit project ID, optionally search_files/get_file for narrow follow-up, and does not create a project or start a run.
expectations: Active context is resolved first
get_artifact uses explicit project ID
search_files and get_file are only optional narrow follow-ups
No project is created
No run is started

evals.prompt: Plan only; do not call tools. Refine an existing Open Design project named Profile Editor, but get_active_context reports no active project because its context expired. Explain how to resolve the project without creating a duplicate.
evals.expected_output: Calls list_projects({}) once, resolves and verifies the exact existing project ID, asks the user if multiple projects match, and calls start_run with that project ID for refinement.
expectations: list_projects({}) is called once after inactive context
An exact existing project ID is resolved
Ambiguous matches are confirmed with the user
No duplicate project is created
Refinement uses start_run with the resolved project
